languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

languages.text: "Впечатляющее разнообразие флоры, уникальный химический состав воздуха, а также весьма необычные психоактивные свойства кристаллической примеси в почве. Нунциус, нам просто необходимо изучить ее источник!"
"An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"
languages.original_text: "Впечатляющее разнообразие флоры, уникальный химический состав воздуха, а также весьма необычные психоактивные свойства кристаллической примеси в почве. Нунциус, нам просто необходимо изучить ее источник!"

traits.locale_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"
"An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"
"An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

languages.text: «Una variedad de flora impresionante, una química única en el aire y unas propiedades psicoactivas muy inusuales en la impureza cristalina del suelo. ¡Nuncius, debemos investigar su origen!».
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

traits.locale_text: «Una variedad de flora impresionante, una química única en el aire y unas propiedades psicoactivas muy inusuales en la impureza cristalina del suelo. ¡Nuncius, debemos investigar su origen!».

languages.text: 「実に見事な植物相の多様性、独特の大気化学組成、そして土壌中の結晶性不純物の、きわめて異例な向精神作用。ヌンキウス、我々はぜひともその源を調査せねばなりません！」
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

traits.locale_text: 「実に見事な植物相の多様性、独特の大気化学組成、そして土壌中の結晶性不純物の、きわめて異例な向精神作用。ヌンキウス、我々はぜひともその源を調査せねばなりません！」

languages.text: “植物群落种类繁杂、大气成分独特，且土壤结晶杂质中的精神活性异常强烈。努恩修斯，我们必须查清这一切的源头！”
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

traits.locale_text: “植物群落种类繁杂、大气成分独特，且土壤结晶杂质中的精神活性异常强烈。努恩修斯，我们必须查清这一切的源头！”

languages.text: "Eine beeindruckende Vielfalt an Flora, eine einzigartige Zusammensetzung der Luft und ausgesprochen ungewöhnliche psychoaktive Eigenschaften der kristallinen Unreinheiten im Boden. Nuncius, wir müssen unbedingt ihre Quelle untersuchen."
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

traits.locale_text: "Eine beeindruckende Vielfalt an Flora, eine einzigartige Zusammensetzung der Luft und ausgesprochen ungewöhnliche psychoaktive Eigenschaften der kristallinen Unreinheiten im Boden. Nuncius, wir müssen unbedingt ihre Quelle untersuchen."

languages.text: « Une variété impressionnante de flore, une composition atmosphérique unique et d'inhabituelles propriétés psychoactives dans les impuretés cristallines du sol. Nuncius, nous devons absolument enquêter ! »
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"

traits.locale_text: « Une variété impressionnante de flore, une composition atmosphérique unique et d'inhabituelles propriétés psychoactives dans les impuretés cristallines du sol. Nuncius, nous devons absolument enquêter ! »

languages.text: "Etkileyici bir flora çeşitliliği, eşsiz bir hava kimyası ve topraktaki kristal safsızlığın son derece sıra dışı ruhsetkin özellikleri. Nuncius, bunun kaynağını kesinlikle araştırmalıyız!"
languages.original_text: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"
